name: 1'6"x2'6" Rubber Bristle Boot Scrapping Doormat - Threshold™: Outdoor Mat, Black, Low Pile, Stripe Pattern
description:
Stop dirt in its tracks as you welcome guests into your home in style with the help of this Rubber Bristle Boot Scraper Doormat from Threshold™. Made from 100% rubber, this doormat is designed with small rubber bristles with a vented design to gently scrape off dirt and dust from shoes before entering your home. Featuring a low-pile construction for easy maintenance, it's designed in a solid black hue for classic style. Simply place it in front of your front door to prevent shoes from carrying dirt inside.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
